values.content:
=Classify the user query into ONE of these categories:
refund
pricing
support
other

Query:
{{ $json.user_query }}

Return ONLY the category name.

assignments.name: email_body
assignments.value: =Hi,  We have received your request regarding: "{{$json.user_query}}"  Our team is currently reviewing it and you will receive an update within 24–48 hours.  Thank you for your patience.  Best regards,   Support Team

assignments.name: email_body
assignments.value: =Hi,  Thank you for your interest in our services.  Regarding your query: "{{$json.user_query}}"  Our team will share detailed pricing information, including plans and features, shortly.  If you have specific requirements, feel free to reply to this email.  Best regards,   Support Team

assignments.name: email_body
assignments.value: =Hi,  We have received your support request regarding: "{{$json.user_query}}"  Our technical team is currently reviewing the issue and will get back to you with a solution as soon as possible.  We appreciate your patience.  Best regards,   Support Team

assignments.name: email_body
assignments.value: =Hi,  Thank you for reaching out to us.  We have received your message: "{{$json.user_query}}"  Our team will review your request and respond shortly with the appropriate information.  Best regards,   Support Team

parameters.subject: =Support Request Update
parameters.message: Hi,  You have already submitted a request for this issue. Our team is already working on it.  Thanks, Support Team
